Veterans Benefits: California allows eligible taxpayers to exclude up to $20,000 of qualifying military retirement or Survivor Benefit Plan income for tax years 2025-2029, subject to AGI limits; qualifying 100% disabled veterans and eligible surviving spouses may receive a disabled veterans property-tax exemption on a principal residence.

Description: Eureka is a small North Coast city on Humboldt Bay with a local VA clinic, a high-tax California cost profile, and strong access to redwood parks, beaches, fishing, and local arts. Its cool maritime climate is mild year-round, while recent FBI-derived crime rates are materially above the national average.
